message: Fix docs workflow: drop pnpm dependency, use npm directly

files.patch:
@@ -21,14 +21,9 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
-
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
-          cache: pnpm
-
-      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - run: cd docs && npm ci
